name.description: Specifies the friendly name of the new secret. The secret name can consist of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, and any of the following characters: /_+=.@- Conflicts with name_prefix

recovery_window_in_days.description: Specifies the number of days that AWS Secrets Manager waits before it can delete the secret.

tags.description: A mapping of tags to assign to the secret.

kms_key_id.description: Specifies the ARN, Key ID, or alias of the AWS KMS customer master key (CMK) to be used to encrypt the secret values in the versions stored in this secret.
